import LCS.Basic import Mathlib.Algebra.Star.Module import Mathlib.Tactic.Abel import Mathlib.Tactic.Ring set_option linter.unusedSectionVars false variable {R : Type*} [Ring R] [StarRing R] [Algebra ℂ R] [StarModule ℂ R]variable {G : LCSLayout} noncomputable def InducedMeasurementSystem {I J : Type*} [Fintype I] [Fintype J] [DecidableEq J] (f : I → R) (g : I → J) : J → R := fun j => ∑ i ∈ Finset.univ.filter (fun i => g i = j), f i lemma induced_measurement_system_is_measurement_system {I J : Type*} [Fintype I] [Fintype J] [DecidableEq J] (f : I → R) (h : IsMeasurementSystem f) (g : I → J) : IsMeasurementSystem (InducedMeasurementSystem f g) where sum_one := R:Type u_1inst✝⁶:Ring Rinst✝⁵:StarRing Rinst✝⁴:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝³:StarModule ℂ RI:Type u_2J:Type u_3inst✝²:Fintype Iinst✝¹:Fintype Jinst✝:DecidableEq Jf:I → Rh:IsMeasurementSystem fg:I → J⊢ ∑ x, InducedMeasurementSystem f g x = 1 R:Type u_1inst✝⁶:Ring Rinst✝⁵:StarRing Rinst✝⁴:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝³:StarModule ℂ RI:Type u_2J:Type u_3inst✝²:Fintype Iinst✝¹:Fintype Jinst✝:DecidableEq Jf:I → Rh:IsMeasurementSystem fg:I → J⊢ ∑ x, ∑ i with g i = x, f i = 1 All goals completed! 🐙 idempotent j := R:Type u_1inst✝⁶:Ring Rinst✝⁵:StarRing Rinst✝⁴:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝³:StarModule ℂ RI:Type u_2J:Type u_3inst✝²:Fintype Iinst✝¹:Fintype Jinst✝:DecidableEq Jf:I → Rh:IsMeasurementSystem fg:I → Jj:J⊢ InducedMeasurementSystem f g j * InducedMeasurementSystem f g j = InducedMeasurementSystem f g j R:Type u_1inst✝⁶:Ring Rinst✝⁵:StarRing Rinst✝⁴:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝³:StarModule ℂ RI:Type u_2J:Type u_3inst✝²:Fintype Iinst✝¹:Fintype Jinst✝:DecidableEq Jf:I → Rh:IsMeasurementSystem fg:I → Jj:J⊢ (∑ i with g i = j, f i) * ∑ i with g i = j, f i = ∑ i with g i = j, f i R:Type u_1inst✝⁶:Ring Rinst✝⁵:StarRing Rinst✝⁴:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝³:StarModule ℂ RI:Type u_2J:Type u_3inst✝²:Fintype Iinst✝¹:Fintype Jinst✝:DecidableEq Jf:I → Rh:IsMeasurementSystem fg:I → Jj:J⊢ ∑ i with g i = j, f i * ∑ i with g i = j, f i = ∑ i with g i = j, f i R:Type u_1inst✝⁶:Ring Rinst✝⁵:StarRing Rinst✝⁴:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝³:StarModule ℂ RI:Type u_2J:Type u_3inst✝²:Fintype Iinst✝¹:Fintype Jinst✝:DecidableEq Jf:I → Rh:IsMeasurementSystem fg:I → Jj:Jx:Ihx:x ∈ {i | g i = j}⊢ f x * ∑ i with g i = j, f i = f x R:Type u_1inst✝⁶:Ring Rinst✝⁵:StarRing Rinst✝⁴:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝³:StarModule ℂ RI:Type u_2J:Type u_3inst✝²:Fintype Iinst✝¹:Fintype Jinst✝:DecidableEq Jf:I → Rh:IsMeasurementSystem fg:I → Jj:Jx:Ihx:x ∈ {i | g i = j}⊢ ∑ i with g i = j, f x * f i = f x have : ∑ i ∈ Finset.univ.filter (fun i => g i = j), f x * f i = f x * f x := R:Type u_1inst✝⁶:Ring Rinst✝⁵:StarRing Rinst✝⁴:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝³:StarModule ℂ RI:Type u_2J:Type u_3inst✝²:Fintype Iinst✝¹:Fintype Jinst✝:DecidableEq Jf:I → Rh:IsMeasurementSystem fg:I → Jj:J⊢ InducedMeasurementSystem f g j * InducedMeasurementSystem f g j = InducedMeasurementSystem f g j R:Type u_1inst✝⁶:Ring Rinst✝⁵:StarRing Rinst✝⁴:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝³:StarModule ℂ RI:Type u_2J:Type self_adjoint j := R:Type u_1inst✝⁶:Ring Rinst✝⁵:StarRing Rinst✝⁴:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝³:StarModule ℂ RI:Type u_2J:Type u_3inst✝²:Fintype Iinst✝¹:Fintype Jinst✝:DecidableEq Jf:I → Rh:IsMeasurementSystem fg:I → Jj:J⊢ star (InducedMeasurementSystem f g j) = InducedMeasurementSystem f g j R:Type u_1inst✝⁶:Ring Rinst✝⁵:StarRing Rinst✝⁴:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝³:StarModule ℂ RI:Type u_2J:Type u_3inst✝²:Fintype Iinst✝¹:Fintype Jinst✝:DecidableEq Jf:I → Rh:IsMeasurementSystem fg:I → Jj:J⊢ star (∑ i with g i = j, f i) = ∑ i with g i = j, f i R:Type u_1inst✝⁶:Ring Rinst✝⁵:StarRing Rinst✝⁴:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝³:StarModule ℂ RI:Type u_2J:Type u_3inst✝²:Fintype Iinst✝¹:Fintype Jinst✝:DecidableEq Jf:I → Rh:IsMeasurementSystem fg:I → Jj:J⊢ ∑ x with g x = j, star (f x) = ∑ i with g i = j, f i All goals completed! 🐙 def ObservableOfMeasurementSystem (f : Fin 2 → R) : R := f 0 - f 1 structure IsObservable (O : R) : Prop where involutive : O * O = 1 self_adjoint : star O = O lemma is_observable_of_measurement_system (f : Fin 2 → R) (h : IsMeasurementSystem f) : IsObservable (ObservableOfMeasurementSystem f) where involutive := R:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rf:Fin 2 → Rh:IsMeasurementSystem f⊢ ObservableOfMeasurementSystem f * ObservableOfMeasurementSystem f = 1 R:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rf:Fin 2 → Rh:IsMeasurementSystem f⊢ (f 0 - f 1) * (f 0 - f 1) = 1 R:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rf:Fin 2 → Rh:IsMeasurementSystem f⊢ f 0 - f 0 * f 1 - (f 1 * f 0 - f 1) = 1 R:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rf:Fin 2 → Rh:IsMeasurementSystem f⊢ f 0 - 0 - (0 - f 1) = 1 R:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rf:Fin 2 → Rh:IsMeasurementSystem f⊢ f 0 + f 1 = 1 All goals completed! 🐙 self_adjoint := R:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rf:Fin 2 → Rh:IsMeasurementSystem f⊢ star (ObservableOfMeasurementSystem f) = ObservableOfMeasurementSystem f R:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ Rf:Fin 2 → Rh:IsMeasurementSystem f⊢ star (f 0 - f 1) = f 0 - f 1 All goals completed! 🐙 def observableSign (a : Fin 2) : ℂ := if a = 0 then 1 else -1 noncomputable def ObservableToProjector (O : R) (a : Fin 2) : R := (1 / 2 : ℂ) • (1 + observableSign a • O) -- ANCHOR: Alice_A /- noncomputable def Alice_A (strat : LCSStrategy R G) (i : Fin G.r) (j : G.V i) : R := (∑ x ∈ Finset.univ.filter (fun (x : Assignment G i) => x j = 0), strat.E i x) - (∑ x ∈ Finset.univ.filter (fun (x : Assignment G i) => x j = 1), strat.E i x) -/ noncomputable def Alice_A (strat : LCSStrategy R G) (i : Fin G.r) (j : G.V i) : R := ObservableOfMeasurementSystem (InducedMeasurementSystem (strat.E i) (fun x => x j))-- ANCHOR_END: Alice_A -- ANCHOR: Bob_B /- def Bob_B (strat : LCSStrategy R G) (j : Fin G.s) : R := strat.F j 0 - strat.F j 1 -/ def Bob_B (strat : LCSStrategy R G) (j : Fin G.s) : R := ObservableOfMeasurementSystem (strat.F j)-- ANCHOR_END: Bob_B lemma bob_is_observable (strat : LCSStrategy R G) (j : Fin G.s) : IsObservable (Bob_B strat j) := is_observable_of_measurement_system (strat.F j) (strat.bob_ms j) lemma alice_is_observable (strat : LCSStrategy R G) (i : Fin G.r) (j : G.V i) : IsObservable (Alice_A strat i j) := is_observable_of_measurement_system _ (induced_measurement_system_is_measurement_system _ (strat.alice_ms i) _) private lemma measurement_commute {I} [Fintype I] {f : I → R} (h : IsMeasurementSystem f) (x y : I) : Commute (f x) (f y) := R:Type u_1inst✝⁴:Ring Rinst✝³:StarRing Rinst✝²:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝¹:StarModule ℂ RI:Type u_2inst✝:Fintype If:I → Rh:IsMeasurementSystem fx:Iy:I⊢ Commute (f x) (f y) R:Type u_1inst✝⁴:Ring Rinst✝³:StarRing Rinst✝²:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝¹:StarModule ℂ RI:Type u_2inst✝:Fintype If:I → Rh:IsMeasurementSystem fx:Iy:Ihxy:x = y⊢ Commute (f x) (f y)R:Type u_1inst✝⁴:Ring Rinst✝³:StarRing Rinst✝²:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝¹:StarModule ℂ RI:Type u_2inst✝:Fintype If:I → Rh:IsMeasurementSystem fx:Iy:Ihxy:¬x = y⊢ Commute (f x) (f y) R:Type u_1inst✝⁴:Ring Rinst✝³:StarRing Rinst✝²:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝¹:StarModule ℂ RI:Type u_2inst✝:Fintype If:I → Rh:IsMeasurementSystem fx:Iy:Ihxy:x = y⊢ Commute (f x) (f y) All goals completed! 🐙 R:Type u_1inst✝⁴:Ring Rinst✝³:StarRing Rinst✝²:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝¹:StarModule ℂ RI:Type u_2inst✝:Fintype If:I → Rh:IsMeasurementSystem fx:Iy:Ihxy:¬x = y⊢ Commute (f x) (f y) All goals completed! 🐙 private lemma measurement_commute_sum {I} [Fintype I] {f : I → R} (h : IsMeasurementSystem f) (A B : Finset I) : Commute (∑ x ∈ A, f x) (∑ y ∈ B, f y) := Commute.sum_left _ _ _ (fun x _ => Commute.sum_right _ _ _ (fun y _ => measurement_commute h x y)) lemma alice_observables_commute (strat : LCSStrategy R G) (i : Fin G.r) (j j' : G.V i) : Commute (Alice_A strat i j) (Alice_A strat i j') := R:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ RG:LCSLayoutstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rj:↥(G.V i)j':↥(G.V i)⊢ Commute (Alice_A strat i j) (Alice_A strat i j') R:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ RG:LCSLayoutstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rj:↥(G.V i)j':↥(G.V i)comm:∀ (A B : Finset (Assignment G i)), Commute (∑ x ∈ A, strat.E i x) (∑ y ∈ B, strat.E i y) := measurement_commute_sum (strat.alice_ms i)⊢ Commute (Alice_A strat i j) (Alice_A strat i j') All goals completed! 🐙 lemma alice_bob_commute (strat : LCSStrategy R G) (i : Fin G.r) (j : G.V i) : Commute (Alice_A strat i j) (Bob_B strat j) := R:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ RG:LCSLayoutstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rj:↥(G.V i)⊢ Commute (Alice_A strat i j) (Bob_B strat ↑j) R:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ RG:LCSLayoutstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rj:↥(G.V i)⊢ Commute (∑ i_1 with (fun x => x j) i_1 = 0, strat.E i i_1 - ∑ i_1 with (fun x => x j) i_1 = 1, strat.E i i_1) (strat.F (↑j) 0 - strat.F (↑j) 1) R:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ RG:LCSLayoutstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rj:↥(G.V i)⊢ Commute (∑ i_1 with (fun x => x j) i_1 = 0, strat.E i i_1) (strat.F strat.E i i_1) (strat.F (↑j) 0 - strat.F (↑j) 1) R:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ RG:LCSLayoutstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rj:↥(G.V i)⊢ Commute (∑ i_1 with Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ RG:LCSLayoutstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rj:↥(G.V i)⊢ Commute (∑ i_1 with (fun x => x j) i_1 = 1, strat.E i i_1) (strat.F (↑j) 1) all_goals R:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ RG:LCSLayoutstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rj:↥(G.V i)⊢ Commute (∑ i_1 with (fun x => x j) i_1 = 1, strat.E i i_1) (strat.F (↑j) 1) R:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring R:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring Rinst✝²:StarRing Rinst✝¹:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝:StarModule ℂ RG:LCSLayoutstrat:LCSStrategy R Gi:Fin G.rj:↥(G.V i)x:Assignment G ia✝:x ∈ {i_1 | (fun x => x j) i_1 = 1}⊢ Commute (strat.E i x) (strat.F (↑j) 1) All goals completed! 🐙 } lemma measurement_intersection {I} [Fintype I] [DecidableEq I] {f : I → R} (h : IsMeasurementSystem f) (S T : Finset I) : (∑ x ∈ S, f x) * (∑ y ∈ T, f y) = ∑ x ∈ (S ∩ T), f x := R:Type u_1inst✝⁵:Ring Rinst✝⁴:StarRing Rinst✝³:Algebra ℂ Rinst✝²:StarModule ℂ RI:Type u_2inst✝¹:Fintype Iinst✝:DecidableEq If:I → Rh:IsMeasurementSystem fS:Finset IT:Finset I⊢ IT:Finset Ih_mul:∀ (x : I), f x * ∑ y ∈ T, f y = if x ∈ T then f x else 0 := fun x => Eq.mpr (id (congrArg (fun _a => _a = if x ∈ T then f x else 0) (Finset.mul_sum T f (f x)))) (if hxT : x ∈ T then Eq.mpr (id (congrArg (fun _a => ∑ i ∈ T, f x * f i = _a) (if_pos hxT))) (have this := Finset.sum_eq_single x (fun b a hb => h.orthogonal x b (Ne.symm hb)) fun hnx => False.elim (hnx hxT); Eq.mpr (id (congrArg (fun _a => _a = f x) this)) (Eq.mpr (id (congrArg (fun _a => _a = f x) (h.idempotent x))) (Eq.refl (f x)))) else Eq.mpr (id (congrArg (fun _a => ∑ i ∈ T, f x * f i = _a) (if_neg hxT))) (Finset.sum_eq_zero fun y hy => h.orthogonal x y fun h_eq => Eq.ndrec (motive := fun y => y ∈ T → False) (fun hy => False.elim (hxT hy)) h_eq hy))⊢ (∑ x ∈ S, if x ∈ T then f x else 0) = ∑ x ∈ S ∩ T, f x All goals completed! 🐙 lemma bob_measurement_eq_projector (strat : LCSStrategy R G) (j : Fin G.s) (y : Fin 2) : strat.F j y = ObservableToProjector (Bob_B strat j) y := R:Type u_1inst✝³:Ring
